text:
PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CTGRY_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
8 
FILE(S): 
APR Enrollment 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
1: Active (when PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CD equals “01”–“06”) 
2: Denied (when PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CD equals “20”–“24”) 
3: Pending (when PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CD equals “40”–“48”) 
4: Terminated (when PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CD equals “60”–“83”) 
COMMENT: 
—
